alec.title: Alec - Luxury Furniture
description: As Design Manager in a small but innovative furniture factory, I developed luxury lines using high-perceived-value materials.
I learned to work with 19mm glass, cast aluminum, stainless steel, and metalwork, merging technical aesthetics with premium finishes.
This stage marked the beginning of my professional career, facing the challenge of leading design within an artisanal-industrial production structure.

demario.title: Demario - Entrepreneurship and Design
description: My first foray as an entrepreneur, creating high-end office furniture lines (Bubble, Prisma, Royal, and Verona).
Responsible for the entire cycle: from design and web development to manual production in metalworking workshops.
Participated in the Latin American Design Network at Corferias, understanding the financial and operational complexity of owning a business.

corferias.title: Corferias Participation - Design Network
description: Exhibition of original designs in one of the most important venues in Colombia.
Validation of aesthetic proposals before a massive and professional audience in the design sector.
Consolidation of a contact network within the Latin American design ecosystem.

renderizador.title: 3D Architectural Visualization
description: Specialized in high-fidelity rendering using 3ds Max for architectural projects.
Perfected skills in lighting, texturing, and digital composition.
Transitioned towards a 'Digital Product' mindset, understanding the power of visualization for selling ideas.

maderkit.title: Maderkit - Design Manager and Digital Product Lead
description: Leadership in designing mass-market RTA furniture for Homecenter, Jamar, and Alkosto, with over 3 million units sold.
Creator of the patented 'Space' extensible furniture system and leader of the digital transformation toward Manufacturing 4.0.
Evolved from Head of Design to Head of Digital Products, implementing Augmented Reality and Artificial Intelligence in industrial processes.

mario-mojica.title: Mario Mojica - Digital Transformation
description: Founded my own brand focused on accompanying companies in the adoption of AI, BIM methodologies, and marketing automation.
Development of the Guadua Chair as a validation of parametric design, advanced manufacturing, and contemporary aesthetics.
Creation of own web platform as a showcase for digital experiences and innovation tools.

Hero.title: I am Mario Mojica: Industrial Designer specialized in automating the complete manufacturing and marketing cycle.

About.title: GENERATIVE DESIGN AND AUTOMATION MAXIMIZING PROFITABILITY IN THE FURNITURE INDUSTRY
About.p1: I am Mario Mojica, an Industrial Designer expert in process automation using generative design for the furniture industry. My career is not just measured in years, but in more than 3 million products that currently inhabit homes across Latin America. Since 2020, I have consolidated my profile as a technological strategist, dedicated to solving business inefficiency by fusing manufacturing mastery with AI acceleration.
About.p2: My focus is not just aesthetic; it's systemic. I use a cutting-edge ecosystem —integrating Rhino 3D, Grasshopper, and n8n— to transform the way products are conceived. My goal is to achieve superior profitability, creating optimized workflows ready for Manufacturing 4.0. I don't just design objects; I design the intelligent systems that make them possible.
About.p3: Specialized in turning slow design departments into high-performance units, my methodology integrates CNC workflows, advanced visualization in Blender/Three.js, and marketing automation. I have managed to reduce development and technical response cycles by up to 80%, eliminating traditional bottlenecks.
About.p4: Conventional design areas are often costly and non-agile; my mission is to change that reality. I bring 15 years of experience in mass manufacturing to an AI technology stack to deliver renders, blueprints, and assembly manuals with surgical precision. I accompany companies in making the definitive leap towards digital transformation, implementing processes that ensure their competitiveness in the global market.
